name: Sub Station
explanation: A modern virtual-analog acid/electro bass mono synth: a saw oscillator and a hard-synced pulse oscillator (the Sync control sets OSC2's pitch above OSC1, tearing out a screaming sync edge) plus a sub one octave down for weight. The mix drives a snappy resonant low-pass that squelches and screams under its decay envelope, then a post Overdrive stage adds aggressive, slightly-digital grit for in-your-face acid lines and squelchy leads.
